item.title: ìWhat to Know Before You Go
item.description: Helpful tips and insights for anyone planning a dealership visit, covering what to expect and how to prepare. What should you know before stepping onto the lot?

item.title: Avoiding a $2,000 Trade-In Mistake
item.description: A real example highlights how a trade-in decision led to a costly mistake and what to watch for. What steps can help you avoid overpaying?
